sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21461" key="galaktourge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γᾰλακτ-ουργέω</orth>, <sense id="n21461.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make of milk</tr_>, as cheese, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:251" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.251</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n21461.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make milk</tr_>, as a nursing woman, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
